title: ZoningLot
description: A property / zoning lot that is (or has been) the subject of one or more BSA cases — the physical spine that ties a case to the tax lot, building, and zoning district. Canonical schema reconciling the 'BSA Action Portal' legacy calendar index (f72e-3i4c, 18 columns), which reaches back to 1916, with the premise fields carried by the Applications Status dataset. Keyed on BBL.

calendars.description: Calendar numbers of BSA cases at this lot ('CalendarNumber'), including legacy cases back to 1916.
